# Nexent Agent Factory

Nexent Agent Factory is a SaaS workspace for OpenAI Codex agent workflow platform.

Website: https://nexentagent.space/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: OpenAI Codex agent workflow platform
Type: SaaS
Default plan: team

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
